title: A living template engine re-applies upstream changes to instantiated projects
content: A template engine with update propagation can re-apply later template changes to an already-instantiated project via a three-way merge, unlike a one-time snapshot. This is the decisive capability for distributing a harness that keeps gaining skills, gates, and schema versions.
summary: Update-propagating template engines re-apply upstream changes to instantiated projects; snapshots cannot.
